languages.text: Wait~ How could you know? You, too, see the glimpses, skinbag?

traits.locale_text: Wait~ How could you know? You, too, see the glimpses, skinbag?

languages.text: "Откуда тебе известно... Я понял! Ты уже здесь бывал".
"How do you know this... I see! You've been here before."
languages.original_text: "Откуда тебе известно... Я понял! Ты уже здесь бывал".

traits.locale_text: "How do you know it... I see! You've been here before."
"How do you know this... I see! You've been here before."
"How do you know this... I see! You've been here before."

languages.text: "Woher wisst Ihr das ... Ich verstehe! Ihr wart schon mal hier."
languages.original_text: "How do you know this... I see! You've been here before."

traits.locale_text: "Woher wisst Ihr das ... Ich verstehe! Ihr wart schon mal hier."

languages.text: « Comment savez-vous ceci... Je vois ! Ce n'est pas votre première visite. »
languages.original_text: "How do you know this... I see! You've been here before."

traits.locale_text: « Comment savez-vous ceci... Je vois ! Ce n'est pas votre première visite. »

languages.text: «¿Cómo sabes eso...? ¡Ya veo! Has estado aquí antes».
languages.original_text: "How do you know this... I see! You've been here before."

traits.locale_text: «¿Cómo sabes eso...? ¡Ya veo! Has estado aquí antes».

languages.text: "Nereden biliyorsun bunu?.. Anladım! Buraya daha önce geldin."
languages.original_text: "How do you know this... I see! You've been here before."

traits.locale_text: "Nereden biliyorsun bunu?.. Anladım! Buraya daha önce geldin."

languages.text: “你怎么知道的……我明白了！你以前来过这里。”
languages.original_text: "How do you know this... I see! You've been here before."

traits.locale_text: “你怎么知道的……我明白了！你以前来过这里。”

languages.text: 「どうやって知ってるの…分かった！君、前に来たことがあるのね。」
languages.original_text: "How do you know this... I see! You've been here before."

traits.locale_text: 「どうやって知ってるの…分かった！君、前に来たことがあるのね。」
